text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is turning over a new leaf. She
swears to relish in her love for Umamusume only
during her free time and dedicates herself to
running, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! I really jumped the gun, don't you
think?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the excitement over the Japan Dirt Derby dies
down, so does her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm supposed to rise to the same level as other Umamusume? Me?! Is that even possible?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anything is fair game when it comes to fantasy,
but I think this summer heat has started to fry my
brain a bit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What I'm trying to say is... I'm not sure I'm
capable of doing this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All I've done up until now is bask in the divine
glow of Umamusume. Now I'm supposed to
believe I can stand beside them?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even if I try to overhaul myself, I'm unsure how
much I can change after spending all that time in
the past daydreaming.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm not saying the game is rigged. And I haven't
given up either... It's just...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In times like these, when it seems there's no way
forward, all there is to do is bang my head against
my manuscript... Okay, I'm gonna continue this in
my dorm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y'know... for my new zine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King-centric fanzine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Basically, it's gonna be a manga about King Halo.
I've been thinking of transforming her sublime
daily life into sixteen-page fan comic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a bit to squeeze the info out of her, but
it's sounding like she's creating a sort of fan
comic.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A fan project, huh? I would appreciate it if you
asked for permission first, though, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, you're absolutely right. It's just that... it's
pretty taboo to make the actual person aware of
this sort of... thing...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait a second! King?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The heroine herself stands before us.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-a-all that talk about a fan comic just now, I was
just joking! Something like that can't possibly be
real... Call it a wild delusion on my part!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, what could I have done to
afford this visitation?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I just figured I'd come by to say hi. By the way,
Digital...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're planning to run in this year's Mile
Championship, yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! I was so moved watching you run in it last
year, I wanted to follow in your footsteps...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's nice to hear. However, if you're
planning to run...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Then that makes us rivals, since I'm running this
year as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
REEEALLY?! You're gracing us with your presence
yet again?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes. Although... I'm not sure how well I'll do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital quickly turns gloomy. I wonder
what's come over her.
choice_data_list: Why the long face all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's just... It's like King doesn't have the
same kind of energy she did last year...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She got a solid third in the Yasuda Kinen! But in
the G2 race before that, she only took eleventh.
You can say that's a sign she's recovering her
standing, but that makes this summer a critical
time for her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you remember even my placing? You're
certainly well-informed. It reminds me of the
younger students who always cheer me on...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's because you're one of my absolute
faves.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry if this isn't my place to say, but... I'm
cheering for you, King.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even if we're rivals on the track... my love for you
as a fan will still be as strong as ever.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Well, I appreciate it. I'll make sure I
put on a performance that does my name justice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying that, King Halo walks off, still
looking glum.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It looks like we need to make a change
of plans!
choice_data_list:
You mean you want to reconsider the Mile
Championship?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not that. What I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've got to change my manuscript!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My original idea was a manga, but when it comes
to supporting King, my personal preferences
should sit on the sidelines.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to make something that will give King a
huge dose of energy, as a fellow runner.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So the question is... what's the right kind of book
to bring her back to life?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you have any ideas, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What kind of book would improve her
performance?
choice_data_list: A book filled with empowering fan chants.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A book of chants! I see! If a gem like that can
restore her spirit...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then I could share it with her fans so everyone
can learn them! Would you lend me a hand?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital spends her spare time
working on King Halo's gift. Afterwards...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What in the world is going on, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. It's all fine. Just stand here, please.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, King fans! Did everyone read your
books? Then, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What's her name?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is she the strongest?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: She's the champion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: How's the future looking?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
It's so bright! She's the Umamusume everyone
wants to be!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Now, give it up for King!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King! King! King King King!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: King! King! King King King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh... You did all this just for me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's a lot more going on than my usual
chants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo seems happy, as if just hearing the
chant has given her energy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
An illustration collection! Yeah... And if it's
something small, I could even give it to her
directly without breaking any rules.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which means we have to go pay our respects to
all the best illustrators at summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If you would be so kind, I'd like to request just
one illustration of King looking composed!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, if you're really okay with my drawing... Is
a picture book style all right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you asking me for?! I'm not saying I can't do it... but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital goes around commissioning
each and every artist she knows, until...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This book is... a present for me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's just a small tribute. I was hoping it could help
cheer you up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is a very thoughtful summer gift. Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh... This one's... extremely detailed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that one! That one was born out of an excess
of devotion that kept the artist up for three
nights straight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital put more effort into her drawing
than anyone else. Between all her work
illustrating and commissioning others, she seems
to have cultivated a wealth of perseverance.
